Vermont Studio Center Residency
Open to artists worldwide.

New York Fellowship
Now accepting applications from NYC-based, BIPOC artists. Fellows receive a $5,000 stipend.
Deadline: rolling | info

A global award for emerging media artists, featuring grants and a residency with Ars Electronica.
